description: Shared STEP-0 funnel-BUILD engine selector registry for Skill 6 (06-ghl-install-pages). This is the ONE place a 'build me a funnel' request is routed to the specialist AUTHORING engine that owns that funnel's copy + image IP. Skill 6 remains the ONE GHL delivery rail: every engine below AUTHORS copy/images inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES the GHL media folder + upload + funnel/page build BACK to Skill 6 (ghl_media.py + ghl_rest_canvas.py / ghl_builder.py). The selector never builds anything itself and never blocks a build.
how_to_register_a_second_entry: Append one object to engines[] with a unique id, the skill dir, the canonical fail-closed entry shell, a priority, and a match block (names/keywords/signals/anti_signals). No selector code change is required. See funnel-engines/README.md. Skill 56 (Sales-Page-Assets) is now REGISTERED as the second entry (direct-response sales page / VSL family) — the pattern below is the template for any third engine.
default_behavior: When NO engine clears its confidence threshold, the selector returns decision=NO_ENGINE_MATCH and the caller FALLS THROUGH to the existing template-first funnel matcher (tools/funnel_matcher.py step0_match) and the generic Skill-6 build path. A below-threshold score never prevents a build.

engines.name: Trevor Otts Signature Funnel
engines.summary: The SACRED 12-section Hero copy system + 5,000-19,000-char gpt-image-2 prompts, built as a configurable 3/5/7-step GHL funnel (Main -> Checkout -> Upsell-1 -> Downsell-1 -> Upsell-2 -> Downsell-2 -> Thank-You with accept/decline branching).
engines.entry_contract: NOTHING generates copy/prompts, calls Kie, touches GHL, or mints a certificate except THROUGH signature-funnel-entry.sh (deps -> version -> hash-pin -> bypass-scan -> run-scoped 0600 nonce). A direct orchestrator call without the front-door nonce dies AF-FUN-FRONT-DOOR.
engines.delivery_delegation: P4 media folder + upload -> Skill 6 ghl_media.py; P7 funnel/step/page build + HTML injection -> Skill 6 ghl_rest_canvas.py / ghl_builder.py. Skill 49 authors; Skill 6 delivers.
engines.notes: Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own configured providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys); the fail-closed provers are deterministic and model-free. Publish is human-approved (preview URLs + labeled ~/Downloads bundle only).

engines.name: Trevor Otts Sales Page Assets (Direct-Response)
engines.summary: The Direct-Response asset stack (the DR sibling of Skill 49): the 8-section main sales page (A/B + countdown timer), the Trevor Otts 9-section upsell (A/B personas), a downsell recovery page, the Sovereign Architect high-ticket long-form page (6,500-7,100 words), 40-80-word order-bump copy with a checkbox close, and a slice-covered image plan — from one 'Ultimate AI Sales Page Writer' survey.
engines.entry_contract: NOTHING generates copy/image-prompts, calls an image provider, touches GHL, writes Docs, sends mail, or mints a certificate except THROUGH sales-page-assets-entry.sh (deps -> version -> hash-pin -> bypass-scan -> run-scoped 0600 nonce). A direct orchestrator call without the front-door nonce dies AF-SP56-FRONT-DOOR; a hand-rolled GHL REST / ImgBB / raw image createTask / mail sender in the run dir dies AF-SP56-CANONICAL-BYPASS.
engines.delivery_delegation: P4 media folder + upload -> Skill 6 ghl_media.py; P9 funnel/step/page build + HTML injection -> Skill 6 ghl_rest_canvas.py / ghl_builder.py; the order-bump copy routes to the Skill 44 order-bump seam. Skill 56 authors + gates; Skill 6 delivers; Skill 47 (or the client's own image provider) renders images.
engines.notes: Direct-Response sibling of Skill 49 sharing the same labeling grammar (56 OWNS it) and the same STEP-0 selector + delivery rail. Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own configured providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys); the eight fail-closed provers are deterministic and model-free. A/B variants come from two client models OR two persona prompts on one client model. Publish is human-approved (preview URLs + labeled ~/Downloads bundle only).
